lessons.detail: After any operation, verify the result before reporting success. Check process status after killing apps, confirm file contents after editing, test functionality after deploying. Never assume success — verify it.

lessons.rule: Write it down or it never happened
lessons.detail: Conversation context will be lost. Lessons must be written to persistent files (CLAUDE.md, SKILL.md, lessons/*.json). Only saying 'I'll remember' in conversation = guaranteed to forget next session.
